name: clavis
description: Clavis — the key to your Claude Code skills. Gallery-grade skills panel with warm gold-on-obsidian design. Browse, search, favorite, and manage skills. Auto-categorizes new skills. Includes Spotlight search, vault backup, and standalone vertical launcher.
author: NUYoah700

skills.name: clavis
skills.description: Launch Clavis at http://127.0.0.1:8765 — a gallery-grade skills panel to browse, search, favorite, and manage all Claude Code skills. Use when you want to discover skills, see what's available, organize your skill library, or find the right skill for a task.
